files.patch:
@@ -10,8 +10,9 @@ on:
 jobs:
   desktop-swift:
     name: Desktop Swift (${{ matrix.os }})
-    # SwiftTesting hits signal 11 on Linux with Swift 6.2.1; allow that leg to fail until SR is fixed upstream.
-    continue-on-error: ${{ matrix.os == 'ubuntu-22.04' }}
+    # Swift 6.2.1 still crashes (SwiftTesting on Linux) and exits 1 on Windows after the test runner finishes.
+    # Keep those legs running for signal, but don't fail the workflow until the upstream toolchain is fixed.
+    continue-on-error: ${{ matrix.os != 'macos-15' }}
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
